title: We Went to Hammock Beach & Loved It
body:
Hammock Beach Resort sits on the Atlantic Ocean in Palm Coast, Florida and it is the kind of place that checks every box for a golf trip.

Oceanfront property, a Jack Nicklaus course with six holes on the water, and then you drive 30 minutes to St. Augustine and play the only course in the world co-designed by Arnold Palmer and Jack Nicklaus. This one has everything.

## The Courses
### 5 Legends & 4 Rounds

![Hammock Beach Ocean Course](https://res.cloudinary.com/dak67vton/image/upload/v1780515209/Hammock_Beach_aemhqk.avif)
*Hammock Beach Ocean Course*

The Ocean Course is the anchor and it earns that spot. Jack Nicklaus designed it and he said himself that as it relates to the East Coast of the United States you are not going to get any better than what you have right here. Six holes play directly along the Atlantic Ocean and the finishing four holes are nicknamed The Bear Claw. Ranked 48th best course in Florida by Golf Digest and one of the most visually stunning finishes in the state.

The Conservatory is the Tom Watson design on the Hammock Beach property. A completely different experience from the Ocean Course with inland elevation changes, wetlands, and a layout that rewards patience and shot making.

The King and Bear at World Golf Village in St. Augustine is the only golf course in the world co-designed by Arnold Palmer and Jack Nicklaus. Twenty five major championships between them and every single hole reflects both of their influences. The front nine winds through loblolly pines and the back nine plays under decades old oak trees with numerous lakes throughout. There is nothing else like it anywhere.

The Slammer and Squire rounds out the trip and is named after Sam Snead and Gene Sarazen. Both rated 4.5 stars by Golf Digest and both hosted PGA Tour and Champions Tour events. A great way to close out a trip of this caliber.

## The Numbers
### 3 Nights & 4 Rounds of Golf

Based on four sharing. Here is exactly what you get for $1,259:

Quoted dates October 12 through 15, 2026 and can be adjusted

- World Golf Village Slammer and Squire: 1 round
- Conservatory at Hammock Beach: 1 round
- World Golf Village King and Bear: 1 round
- Ocean Course at Hammock Beach: 1 round
- Hammock Beach Resort three bedroom two bath villa: 3 nights

Dates and trip is fully customizable. Switch up anything you want to make this your perfect golf trip with our partners at Tee Times USA.

[book-trip url="bit.ly/4txKEne" title="Check it out!" cta="See Details"]

## Where to Stay
### Oceanfront villa right on the Atlantic

The three bedroom two bath resort villa at Hammock Beach puts you right on the property with balconies overlooking the ocean. Pool on site, direct beach access, and a spa if you bring the family or want to make a real vacation out of it. For a guys trip this is exactly the kind of place where you walk off the course, grab a drink, and end up at the beach for the rest of the afternoon. It does not get much better than that.

## From the team
### We build something special and want your feedback
We just launched Daily Tee Times, a free tool that pulls live tee times from courses across the country into one place so you never have to search five different sites again (something we got tired of doing).

No signup required, no fees, just pick your state, your date, and go. We are still building it out and adding new courses and states every week so reply and let us know where you want us to build out next.

Check it out at [Daily Tee Times](dailyteetimes.com)

## The Insider
### The Immortalized Legends

![Slammer & Squire](https://res.cloudinary.com/dak67vton/image/upload/v1780515209/Slammer_and_Squire_uw93ut.avif)
*Slammer & Squire*

The Walk of Champions at World Golf Village is a 1.2 mile brick path that commemorates every World Golf Hall of Fame inductee with a flagstone bearing their name and signature. The Hall of Fame itself has since moved to Pinehurst but the Walk remains and it is worth a lap between rounds. When you are playing courses designed by the people on those stones it hits a little differently.

See you next Thursday.

Beau
excerpt: 3 nights & 4 rounds of Golf for $1,259 in Hammock Beach, Florida
